text: We investigate the factors determining the degradation of 5-hydroxymethylfurfural (HMF) in the electrolyte solution enabling the proposed “indirect” electrooxidation under extremely high substrate and base concentrations. This approach allows to gain a much higher atom economy thereby transforming more of the biomass derived organic molecules during electrolysis.
